title: Data View
description: A data view presents collections of records in non-table layouts such as cards or compact summaries.
whenToUse: Use when users need to browse structured records but a tabular grid is not the best representation.
whenNotToUse: For dense row-and-column comparison, sorting, and bulk actions, use Data Table.
acceptanceCriteria: Public API uses <udc-data-view> Web Component tag.
Figma component set exists and exposes variant properties
Examples and Code tabs are generated from inspected Figma structure
Component CSS uses UDS tokens only
Spec JSON reaches required minimum plus props/states/accessibility
knownIssues: Figma 0.3 has a public placeholder page but no inspectable component set yet; examples, CSS implementation, playground, and Demo Builder entry are intentionally deferred until the Figma component set exists.
